name: STARBUCKS CORP
summary: Starbucks Corporation is the premier roaster, marketer, and retailer of specialty coffee, operating in 89 markets. The company sells handcrafted coffee, tea, and other beverages, high-quality food items, and licensed products through company-operated stores, licensed stores, and grocery and foodservice channels. Brands include Starbucks Coffee, Teavana, Ethos, and Starbucks Reserve. It also licenses trademarks through its Global Coffee Alliance with Nestlé.

products.name: Starbucks Coffee
products.description: Flagship brand offering handcrafted coffee, tea, beverages, and food items through company-operated and licensed stores.

products.name: Teavana
products.description: Tea brand sold through Starbucks channels.

products.name: Starbucks Reserve
products.description: Premium coffee brand offering specialty goods and services.

products.name: Digital Platform
products.description: Industry-leading digital platform supporting customer engagement and ordering.

partnerships.description: Global Coffee Alliance for selling coffee and tea products and licensing Starbucks trademarks through grocery and foodservice channels.
